# AI Skills — ENGIE Customer Portal

Skills from [openai/skills](https://github.com/openai/skills/tree/main/skills/.curated) curated for the ENGIE portal project (React 19, TypeScript, Vite 8, Fluid DS, AWS, Playwright, Sentry).

## Figma → Code Pipeline

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `figma/` | Figma MCP server integration — fetch design context, screenshots, assets |
| `figma-use/` | **Prerequisite** — Plugin API rules for every `use_figma` call |
| `figma-implement-design/` | Translate Figma designs → production React code with 1:1 fidelity |
| `figma-code-connect-components/` | Map Figma components ↔ code components via Code Connect |
| `figma-create-design-system-rules/` | Generate project-specific design system rules (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursor/) |
| `figma-generate-design/` | Build/update Figma screens from code using design system components |
| `figma-generate-library/` | Build a professional-grade design system in Figma from codebase |
| `figma-create-new-file/` | Create new blank Figma files |

## Frontend & UI

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `frontend-skill/` | Art-directed landing pages and premium UI composition |

## Testing & QA

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `playwright/` | CLI-first browser automation (navigation, screenshots, form filling) |
| `playwright-interactive/` | Persistent browser sessions for iterative UI debugging |

## Observability

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `sentry/` | Read-only Sentry CLI — inspect issues, events, root cause analysis |

## Security

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `security-best-practices/` | Language/framework-specific security reviews (JS/TS, Python, Go) |
| `security-threat-model/` | Repository-grounded AppSec threat modeling |
| `security-ownership-map/` | Git-based security ownership topology and bus factor analysis |

## GitHub Workflow

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `gh-fix-ci/` | Debug and fix failing GitHub Actions PR checks |
| `gh-address-comments/` | Address PR review comments via `gh` CLI |

## Documents

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `doc/` | Read, create, edit `.docx` documents with formatting fidelity |
